calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-16-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Set For Trial On Mar-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Annie Yuan Pan (415)538-3333 representing the Defendant and moving party Zora Kolkey. No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ZORA KOLKEY's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against Plaintiff is GRANTED (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott A. Freedman (415-96-8100) for Plaintiff/Moving party Bancal Management.
Annie Pan (# not provided) for Defendant/opposing party Zora Kolkey.
Carol Haraburda, CSR #8052, (925-360-6065) Court Reporter.

The court announces the tentative ruling.

Hearing is held. Argued re: roommate agreement and declaration, illness and vet opinion, time and length of time. (As fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANCAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Carol Haraburda, CSR #8052, (925-360-6065) Court Reporter. (D501)
